subject: refactor(mobile): align burger menu theme section with glow-props implementation
body:
Rewrote the burger menu theme controls to match glow-props' actual
implementation (not just the suggested patterns). Key changes:

- Dark mode toggle is a plain text button ("Light mode" / "Dark mode"),
  not a toggle switch widget — matches glow-props
- Theme list is always visible with scrollable max-h-52, not collapsed
  behind an expandable chevron — matches glow-props
- Section header shows "Light themes" / "Dark themes" above the list —
  matches glow-props
- Theme items show checkmark + name + description (ml-auto) — matches
  glow-props layout exactly
- Menu stays open on toggle and theme selection (children don't call
  onClose), only action items close the menu — matches glow-props
  data-close pattern
- Removed ToggleSwitch component and expanded state — no longer needed
- Cleaned up BurgerMenu.jsx: removed separator/trailing/preventClose
  item properties, simplified to items + children pattern

Tags: ui, mobile, menu, theme, glow-props-alignment
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
